chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 681 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 18.12.2023 Case is fixed for non-prosecution, but no one has turned up to pursue it, reflecting lack of interest on the part of applicant. Accordingly, Cr. Misc. App. is dismissed in non-prosecution along with pending application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
